meaning: vt.(找钱时故意)少找零头,欺骗
examples: He sees no point in ever trying to shortchange business partners.
If you're an overachiever, you may put relaxation low on your priority list.Don't shortchange yourself.
As a college history major, I didn't want to shortchange the book, so I took the time to read it for myself.
We can't shortchange the investments that will allow us to grow in the future.
But what we can't shortchange are those things that are going to allow us to grow long term.
